title: cystopteris fragilis var. tenuis
intro: Cystopteris fragilis var. tenuis, also known as the fragile fern or slender wood fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Cystopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis var. tenuis include its ability to soothe sore throats and relieve congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory health. This fern can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
